x1=0000 & x2=0110 -> y=0000
x1=0001 & x2=0110 -> y=0000
x1=0010 & x2=0110 -> y=0010
x1=0011 & x2=0110 -> y=0010
x1=0100 & x2=0110 -> y=0100
x1=0101 & x2=0110 -> y=0100
x1=0110 & x2=0110 -> y=0110
x1=0111 & x2=0110 -> y=0110
x1=1000 & x2=0110 -> y=0000
x1=1001 & x2=0110 -> y=0000
x1=1010 & x2=0110 -> y=0010
x1=1011 & x2=0110 -> y=0010
x1=1100 & x2=0110 -> y=0100
x1=1101 & x2=0110 -> y=0100
x1=1110 & x2=0110 -> y=0110
x1=1111 & x2=0110 -> y=0110
bus AND4: all passed
